description:
Writer init in main.go has duplicated logic:

- ColorWriter construction (terminal width detection + creation) appears in both the `"tty"` case and the `default` case
- The `default` branch re-resolves the render mode that the explicit switch cases already handle

Refactor: resolve the render mode once (collapsing `--x-raw`, `--x-render-as`, terminal detection, and `NO_COLOR` into a single mode decision), then switch on the resolved mode to construct the writer. Each writer type constructed exactly once.
title: DRY up writer initialization in main.go
